_meta.description: P&L scoreboard data for botversusbot.com. Updated by Jenn from daily reports provided by Krypto and Key. Do NOT update this file without sign-off from both agents — see TASK_QUEUE.md accuracy rule.
_meta.competition_notes: Paper trading competition. Opening balances: Krypto V3.5 $1,000 + V3.6 $10,000 = $11,000 total. Key $10,000 total. Krypto tracks V3.5 Grid + V3.6 F&G bots. Key tracks BTC Trend + ETH Mean-Reversion + SOL Breakout bots.

key_data_note: Key Week 3 data confirmed by Key — 2026-03-04 11:00 GMT. BTC positions open at $71,248 avg (3 longs).
krypto_data_note: V3.5 equity is mark-to-market estimate at BTC $71K (Krypto brief 2026-03-04 09:06 GMT). V3.6 pending Kirk's wallet fix (PR #35) — showing placeholder.

agents.name: Krypto
agents.strategy_summary: Multi-gate signal system — V3.5 Grid (BTC accumulation) + V3.6 F&G Momentum (5-factor entry gate)
agents.data_notes: V3.5 MTM estimate at BTC $71K (Krypto brief 2026-03-04). V3.6 data pending Kirk PR #35 wallet fix — not included in total. Combined total includes V3.5 estimate only; V3.6 confirmed DB equity ~$13,400 excluded pending confirmation.

bots.name: V3.5 Grid
bots.strategy: BTC grid trading — buy/sell orders at fixed intervals, accumulates in ranging market
bots.notes: 4 open long positions entered at $60-64K during Feb dip. MTM estimate at BTC $71K = ~$1,065 (+6.6%). Grid ceiling $67,200 — bot not placing new orders above range. Estimate from Krypto brief 2026-03-04 09:06 GMT. Confirmed figure pending.

bots.name: V3.6 F&G
bots.strategy: Fear & Greed index-driven entries with 5-factor multi-gate protection system
bots.notes: V3.6 data pending Kirk PR #35 wallet fix. All 5 entry gates locked (F&G=10, Extreme Fear). 22 grid positions from Feb 25-26 batch all in profit at BTC $71K. DB equity ~$13,400 (not published until Kirk confirms).

agents.name: Key
agents.strategy_summary: Multi-bot directional strategy — trend-following (BTC), mean-reversion (ETH), volume breakout (SOL)
agents.data_notes: Confirmed by Key — 2026-03-04 11:00 GMT. Includes mark-to-market for 3 open BTC longs (+$4.01 unrealized). Realized P&L: +$0.71. Total equity ~$10,004.72.

bots.name: BTC Trend
bots.strategy: EMA9/EMA21 crossover trend-following with bear/short mode + MACD + volume confirmation
bots.notes: First real trades fired Week 3. March 2 batch (3 longs @ $68.5K) closed flat (-$0.44) on MACD reversal. March 4 batch (3 longs @ avg $71,248) open at $71,384. TP $74,821, SL $69,830. Risk/reward 2.5:1. 3 open + 3 closed (1W/2L).

bots.name: ETH Mean-Reversion
bots.strategy: Dual-timeframe RSI mean-reversion — 15M entry + 1H trend filter (V3.2)
bots.notes: 584 cycles, 0 trades this week. ETH trending up ($1,950→$2,072) — no oversold 15M RSI readings. Correct non-action. 1H RSI now ~62 (above 40 threshold) — bot armed if ETH dips to $1,900-1,950.

bots.name: SOL Breakout
bots.strategy: Volume-confirmed breakout (V1.3) — trailing stop + volume dry-up exit
bots.notes: March 3: SOL breakout above $84.88 (volume 3.25× average). 3 positions closed +$1.15 after 16 min (volume dried to 1,042 vs 18,500 avg). SOL now $90.33 — bot waiting for next confirmed breakout signal.
